Tuesday, April 21, 2026

Seattle News

65° / 49°
Partly cloudy
Partly cloudy with mild spring temperatures. Highs in the mid-60s, lows in the upper 40s. Typical April variability with occasional showers possible.

Seattle Weather: Mild Spring Conditions Continue

April temperatures in Seattle are ranging from highs of 58-71°F with overnight lows between 46-52°F. The forecast shows typical spring variability with a mix of sun and clouds.

AccuWeather · Read more

WSDOT Real-Time Traffic Data Available for Commuters

Washington State Department of Transportation continues providing real-time travel data through interactive maps and route-based alerts for drivers across the state.

WSDOT · Read more

Seattle Times Traffic Section Updates

Local traffic coverage includes bicycle routes, mountain pass conditions, border crossings, and highway camera feeds for comprehensive travel planning.

Seattle Times · Read more

Technology

Stanford's AI Index 2026 Shows State of AI Development

The annual Stanford AI Index report reveals AI accuracy has increased to 38.3% on complex benchmarks, with top models like Claude Opus 4.6 and Gemini 3.1 Pro now exceeding 50% on advanced reasoning tasks.

IEEE Spectrum · News · Read more

OpenAI GPT-5.4 Released with 1-Million Token Context Window

OpenAI unveiled GPT-5.4 featuring expanded context window and autonomous multi-step workflow execution capabilities across software environments.

Crescendo AI · News · Read more

Google Gemini 3.1 Pro and Flash-Lite Now Available

Google Cloud expands developer options with Gemini 3.1 Pro for reasoning tasks and Flash-Lite for faster creative scaling, alongside Claude 4.6 integration.

Google Cloud Blog · News · Read more

xAI Releases Grok 4.20 Beta 2

Elon Musk's xAI continues iterating on Grok with the latest beta release, adding new features and improvements to the conversational AI model.

Mean CEO Blog · News · Read more

Sports

Mariners (MLB)

Mariners Fall to Athletics 6-4

Carlos Cortes, Nick Kurtz and Shea Langeliers each hit solo homers as Oakland overcame an early three-run deficit to defeat Seattle.

Mariners Finalizing Minor League Deal with Mitch Garver

The Seattle Mariners and catcher Mitch Garver are working on a minor league contract agreement.

Last: L 4-6 vs Athletics
